opportunities.rationale: NVDA closed $220.61 May 19 (Perplexity Finance), AH $221.99. 20d SMA $212.38, 50d SMA $194.73 — both below price, strong bullish alignment (Barchart). RSI(14) ~61, elevated but not yet overbought. Q1 FY27 earnings May 20 AMC; consensus $78-80B rev, EPS ~$1.77; options market pricing ~8% move. Entry $215-221 zone anchored to 20d SMA $212.38 as floor. Stop below $205 (structural + round number support). Target $240 = R2 pivot $234.96 + post-earnings gap extension. R:R 1:2.1. Invalidated on guidance miss below $76B revenue or VIX spike above 22.
opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter pre-earnings close May 20 in $215-221 zone; 20d SMA $212.38 is the line in sand for bulls. AH $221.99 confirms demand.
